incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Let's look closely—count by fives to 25.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

steps.text: Here's a hint: Swings has 20, so we placed 4 symbols. Monkey Bars has 25—how many symbols for 25?

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: System places 5 symbols in Monkey Bars column while counting aloud: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. Each symbol stands for 5. For 25, we count: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25. That's 5 symbols for Monkey Bars.
